zh.lifeSummary: 當Hilary Hastings於1237年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾斯坦頓 哈爾庫特時，她的父親Henry de Hastings41歲，母親Ada Huntingdon42歲。她於1255年與William de Harcourt在英國奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1295年之後在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Hilary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the medieval form of the (post-classical) Latin masculine name Hilarius (a derivative of hilaris ‘cheerful’) and its feminine form Hilaria. From the Middle Ages onwards, the name was borne principally by men (in honour of the 4th-century theologian St Hilarius of Poitiers ). Now, however, it is given almost exclusively to girls.

variants.name: Hillary
meanings: Variant spelling of   Hilary  , found mainly in North America.

variants.name: Hilarie
meanings: From the medieval form of the (post-classical) Latin masculine name Hilarius (a derivative of hilaris ‘cheerful’) and its feminine form Hilaria. From the Middle Ages onwards, the name was borne principally by men (in honour of the 4th-century theologian St Hilarius of Poitiers ). Now, however, it is given almost exclusively to girls.

en.lifeSummary: When Hilary Hastings was born in 1237, in Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry de Hastings, was 41 and her mother, Ada Huntingdon, was 42. She married William de Harcourt in 1255, in Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died after 1295, in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Hilary Hastingsが1237年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアスタントン ハーコウルトで生まれた時，父Henry de Hastingsは41歳，母Ada Huntingdonは42歳であった。1255年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでWilliam de Harcourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1295年以後にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアマーケト ボスウオルスで死去した。

ko.Smethwick Green, Cheshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 샌드바치 스멧h윅 그린
ko.lifeSummary: Hilary Hastings(이)가 1237년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스탠턴 하르쿠르트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry de Hastings(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ada Huntingdon(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1255년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 William de Harcourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1295년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 마크트 보스워스에서 사망했다.

ru.Smethwick Green, Cheshire, England: сметвикк грин, сэндбач, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hilary Hastings родилась в 1237 г. в местности стантон харкоурт, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry de Hastings было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Ada Huntingdon, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Harcourt в 1255 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла после 1295 г. в местности маркет босворт, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
